title: No SAST for subprocess-heavy codebase
detail: 99 subprocess calls across 51 files in 31 harnesses. 0 shell=True (excellent), but no CI gate prevents regressions. Community PRs accepted with Copilot review only.
recommendation: Add semgrep or CodeQL workflow targeting subprocess, os.system, shlex patterns.

title: 2,707 tests exist but no CI runs them
detail: 69 test files, 402+ test classes. README badge claims 1,839 (stale), table shows 2,005, actual count is 2,707. ~2,100 backend-free. Zero CI enforcement.
recommendation: Add per-harness pytest CI matrix. Core tests need no backend.

title: SoX effects list passes agent-controlled strings to subprocess without allowlist
detail: audacity sox_backend.py:98 — apply_effect() takes List[str] and appends directly to subprocess.run(). Zero effect validation unlike kdenlive/shotcut codec allowlists.

title: Intelwatch forwards all Click ctx.args to subprocess with zero validation
detail: intelwatch_cli.py:18-22 — allow_extra_args=True + ignore_unknown_options=True. Open-proxy pattern.

title: GIMP Script-Fu escape function missing parenthesis escaping
detail: gimp_backend.py:15-22 — _script_fu_escape() handles \, ", \r, \n but NOT (), the primary control chars in Scheme. Injection via crafted layer names.

title: XXE exposure in shotcut lxml parsing
detail: shotcut session.py:99,109 — etree.fromstring() without resolve_entities=False. lxml does NOT disable entity resolution by default.

title: No path traversal confinement on output paths
detail: All backends use os.path.abspath() but no confinement check. Agent could direct output to arbitrary filesystem locations. Systemic across all 33 harnesses.

title: Immature release cadence
detail: Only 1 release (v0.2.0) in 26 days.

title: Bus factor on merge authority
detail: Primary maintainer handles most merges. 9 team-owned + 24 community harnesses.

title: Inconsistent credential handling
detail: AdGuardHome: JSON config + plaintext HTTP by default. Others: env vars + 0o600 config. Zoom chmod failure silently swallowed.
recommendation: Default to HTTPS. Log chmod failures.

title: No monorepo coordination
detail: 33 independent harnesses. 0 conftest.py files. No shared test runner or CI matrix.

title: Documentation staleness across 4 surfaces
detail: README badge: 1,839 vs table: 2,005. CN/JA: 1,508/11 apps. Plugin README: 1,245/8 harnesses. Hub SKILL.md: missing 8+ harnesses.
recommendation: Sync all surfaces to current counts.

title: repl_skin.py copy-paste drift
detail: 29 copies. Plugin master has skill_path auto-detect not propagated. No update mechanism.
recommendation: Publish shared package or add version check.

title: Missing Code of Conduct
detail: 75% community health. 44 contributors.

title: No static analysis config
detail: No mypy/pyright/ruff. comfyui has namespace package violation (__init__.py at cli_anything/ level).

title: 9 harnesses missing __main__.py
detail: drawio, intelwatch, iterm2, obs-studio, shotcut, videocaptioner, wiremock, zoom, comfyui.

title: CONTRIBUTING.md missing HARNESS.md link
detail: Primary document for new harness contributors is undiscoverable from contribution guide.

title: Shotcut contains outdated HARNESS.md copy
detail: Old directory layout (cli/ vs cli_anything/) and old phase names. Conflicts with canonical v0.2.0.

title: POSITIVE: Subprocess safety genuinely strong
detail: 0 shell=True (99 calls). 0 os.system/os.popen. 0 eval/exec on untrusted input. Parameterized SQL (100% in zotero). Codec allowlists. 0o600 credential files. shlex.split (18 CLIs). No pickle/unsafe YAML.

title: POSITIVE: HARNESS.md novel methodology
detail: 7-phase SOP. Mandatory real-software invocation. Rendering gap warning. TEST.md two-part artifact. Frame-level output verification. MCP backend pattern. Session file locking.

title: Viral growth ~985 stars/day
detail: 28,591 stars in 29 days (v4.1 refresh). 30+ contributors. +1,002 stars in 3 days since v2.0 scan. Growth outpacing governance.

title: POSITIVE: Claude Code plugin marketplace pioneer
detail: .claude-plugin/plugin.json + 5 slash commands + OpenCode parallel. skill_generator.py + Jinja2 scaffolding.
